tagline: Pests Out. Peace In. Every Home in Essex County.
hero_subtitle: Licensed, insured pest control serving all 22 municipalities of Essex County, NJ. 24/7 emergency service with same-day appointments available.
service_area_description: Serving all 22 municipalities including Newark, Montclair, West Orange, Bloomfield, Livingston, Millburn, Nutley, and Maplewood.
seo_title: Essex County Pest Control | Pest Control in Lynn, MA
seo_description: Essex County Pest Control in Lynn, MA. 24/7 emergency pest control with same-day appointments. Bed bugs, rodents, termites, and more. Call (781) 598-3100.
services_subtitle: From bed bugs to wildlife — comprehensive, licensed pest management for homes and businesses across Essex County.
reviews_subtitle: Homeowners trust us for fast, professional pest control with lasting results.
cta_heading: Pests don't wait. Neither should you.
cta_subtitle: Get a free inspection and customized treatment plan — same-day appointments available.
footer_description: Licensed and insured pest control serving all 22 municipalities of Essex County. 24/7 emergency service, free inspections, and proven treatments. Since 2017.

services_featured.name: Bed Bug Extermination
services_featured.description: Fast, thorough bed bug elimination with professional follow-up. We treat your home completely and make sure they don't come back.

services_secondary.name: Termite Treatment
services_secondary.description: Advanced termite detection and elimination. Protect your property from costly structural damage with our proven treatment protocols.

services_accent.name: Rodent Control
services_accent.description: Complete rodent removal — trapping, exclusion, and sanitation. We seal entry points and eliminate the problem at its source.

services_wide.name: Wildlife Removal
services_wide.description: Humane wildlife removal for squirrels, raccoons, and other animals. We relocate safely and seal your property to prevent re-entry.

about_features.title: 24/7 Emergency Service
about_features.description: Pest emergencies happen at all hours. We offer round-the-clock service with same-day and next-day appointments.

about_features.title: Licensed & DEP Certified
about_features.description: Licensed by the NJ Department of Environmental Protection. Every technician is trained, certified, and insured.

about_features.title: Free Inspections
about_features.description: We'll assess your pest problem at no cost and provide an honest recommendation before any treatment begins.

reviews.name: Maria S.
reviews.text: Resolved our rodent problem within days. The technician was thorough, professional, and explained every step.

reviews.name: James T.
reviews.text: Called on Friday for bed bugs, treated Saturday morning. Treatment was thorough with professional follow-up.

reviews.name: Linda K.
reviews.text: Treated cockroach problem professionally across multiple units with immediate, lasting results.
